Implements and defines structures for a launcher menu application on Pebble devices.


## Files
- **[launcher_app.c](launcher_app.c.md)**: Implements a launcher menu application for Pebble devices, managing UI elements and event handling.
- **[launcher_app.h](launcher_app.h.md)**: Defines the `LauncherMenuArgs` structure with a `reset_scroll` boolean for the launcher app.
